author: @Gupta_Lavanya
text:
i think the very concept of “you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love” is this: you appreciate the love they give, and it feels incredible, but at the end of the day, it’s never enough to be the cure.

and as olivia said, no matter how hard she tries to write love songs, they always come laced with melancholy. because sometimes you’re just so sad that even love can’t fully reach you. the album isn’t really about a breakup, but rather the internal turmoil of finding real love and realizing that the fantasy of another person permanently healing us was never true to begin with. even though we all want it to be true so badly.

it perfectly captures how mental struggles can make even genuine love feel incomplete.
video_title: Olivia Rodrigo - the cure (Official Music Video)

text: heart shattered at 5:03 when she crushed that house and revealed that the stage of the music video was all just reminiscing on memories.... the entire mv felt so immersive even though it used unrealistic elements like stop motion. to end it like that was heartbreaking. even though it seems like Olivia literally moved on (to another house), the pain feels so fresh.

author: @alb3rt_ch3n
text:
wow. her lyricism is crazy. she really does seem pretty sad for a girl so in love.

i also love that this love song is less about the other person and is more about how her own "poison" (self-loathing, self-doubt, mental health struggles) is sabotaging the relationship and her love life in general. so nuanced. a lot of love songs often center around the other person, but olivia flips this trope on its head so beautifully with her sharp self-awareness. i am so excited for the album and what other fresh perspectives she brings

author: @NatiFitsum-h8l1o
text:
Dear Drake,

We just wanted to say thank you. Dropping three albums in one day is something almost nobody else could even think about doing, and somehow you still delivered quality, emotion, hits, and vibes all at once. As fans, we appreciate the nonstop dedication you’ve shown for years. No matter how much success you reach, you always find a way to keep evolving and giving people music for every mood and every moment.
You’ve created songs that helped people through heartbreak, motivation, celebrations, late-night drives, and memories we’ll never forget. Your consistency is unmatched, and that’s why so many of us truly believe you’re the GOAT. The way you’ve stayed at the top for so long while still breaking records and changing the sound of music is legendary. Three albums in one day just proves again why your work ethic is different from everybody else’s. Thank you for always feeding the fans, taking risks, and giving us music that connects people all around the world. We don’t take it for granted. Much love and respect from your fans.
video_title: Drake - Burning Bridges

author: @TechManufacturingDaily
text: A masterful fusion of global modern sounds (Afrobeats) and Vietnamese cultural heritage (Trang An, Xuan Pha folk dance, Lac bird). Hearing an English track in collaboration with Tyga, yet paired with visuals deeply rooted in national identity, feels both incredibly proud and trendy. Son Tung isn't just making music for entertainment; he is redefining how to bring Vietnam's 'cultural passport' to the world. A truly bold move that deserves ultimate respect!

author: @ashantesamore
text:
Leo, I had to come leave you your flowers because I’ve genuinely been supporting you from the very beginning, and watching your evolution in real time has been so inspiring and honestly personal to me.

Seeing you go from that vulnerable bathroom video talking about battling depression to THIS version of yourself — confident, successful, glowing, creative, alive, and fully stepping into your power — is beautiful to witness. I’m so happy you "stayed one more day" to experience the fruits of your labor and become the woman you were always meant to be.

Right now, I feel like I’m in a similar mental rut to the place you were in a few years ago, and watching your growth is confirmation for me that there really is light at the end of that tunnel. You may never fully understand how much your journey encourages people who are quietly fighting their own battles.

I love you so much and I’m beyond proud of you. God bless you sista 💗
video_title: Monaleo - Everythang Pinka (feat. Teezo Touchdown)
